nasb.text: When midday was past, they raved until the time of the offering of the evening sacrifice; but there was no voice, no one answered, and no one paid attention.

esv.text: And as midday passed, they raved on until the time of the offering of the oblation, but there was no voice. No one answered; no one paid attention.

cnv.text: 中午過後，他們繼續狂呼亂叫，直到獻晚祭的時候；可是仍沒有聲音，沒有回應，也沒有理睬他們的。

ccb.text: 他们不断地狂呼乱叫，直到献晚祭的时候，仍然毫无动静，没有半点反应。
